feature_list.json.description: Spec-driven feature tracking for autonomous coding sessions. Based on Anthropic autonomous-coding pattern.
important_rules: NEVER remove features from this list - only update status
NEVER mark a feature as 'passed' without end-to-end verification
NEVER modify feature descriptions after generation
Work on ONE feature at a time until it passes or is marked failed
Always leave code in merge-ready state before ending session

features.description: Create vite.config.ts with Tailwind v4 plugin, React, path aliases, and library build config
features.rationale: Build scripts fail without Vite config - blocks all development

verification.criteria: npm run build succeeds without errors

features.description: Create tsconfig.node.json for Vite configuration typing
features.rationale: Referenced by tsconfig.json but missing - TypeScript errors

features.description: Create src/lib/utils.ts with cn() utility using clsx and tailwind-merge
features.rationale: Required by all component templates - blocks component generation

verification.criteria: All components can import cn from @/lib/utils
verification.evidence: src/lib/utils.ts exists with cn(), generateId(), prefersReducedMotion(), delay()

features.description: Add generateId(), prefersReducedMotion(), and delay() utility functions to utils.ts
features.rationale: Common utilities needed across agent implementations

verification.criteria: Unit tests pass for all utility functions
verification.evidence: utils.ts:29-51 contains generateId, prefersReducedMotion, delay; utils.test.ts:27 tests all passing

features.description: Create eslint.config.js with React, TypeScript, jsx-a11y, and security plugins
features.rationale: ESLint in devDeps but no config - code quality not enforced

features.description: Create CLAUDE.md with project conventions, commands, code patterns, and agent guidelines
features.rationale: Anthropic best practice for AI agent projects - enables context persistence

verification.criteria: Claude Code recognizes project patterns automatically
verification.evidence: CLAUDE.md exists with project overview, architecture, agent system, commands, code patterns, conventions, testing patterns

features.description: Create components.json for shadcn/ui CLI compatibility with Tailwind v4 settings
features.rationale: Enables shadcn CLI for component management

features.description: Update package.json with correct build, dev, test, lint, and typecheck scripts

verification.criteria: All npm scripts execute without errors
verification.evidence: package.json has build, dev, test, lint, typecheck scripts; all execute successfully

features.description: Create src/styles/globals.css with Tailwind v4 @import and @theme directive

verification.criteria: CSS compiles with design tokens available
verification.evidence: globals.css has @import tailwindcss and @theme directive with OKLCH colors, spacing, typography tokens

features.description: Add tw-animate-css dependency and remove deprecated tailwindcss-animate
features.rationale: shadcn/ui deprecated tailwindcss-animate in favor of tw-animate-css

features.description: Create .nvmrc and .node-version files specifying Node 20 LTS
features.rationale: Ensures consistent Node version across environments

verification.criteria: nvm use loads correct Node version

features.description: Add .editorconfig for consistent formatting across IDEs

verification.criteria: EditorConfig rules applied in supported editors

features.description: Install testing dependencies: vitest, @testing-library/react, @testing-library/jest-dom, @testing-library/user-event, jsdom
features.rationale: Testing infrastructure required for quality assurance

verification.evidence: All testing deps in package.json devDependencies

features.description: Create src/test/setup.ts with jest-dom matchers and global test configuration
features.rationale: Test setup file needed for jest-dom assertions

verification.criteria: npm run test executes without setup errors

features.description: Create src/test/mocks/framer-motion.ts for animation testing with MotionConfig duration:0
features.rationale: Framer Motion slows tests without mocks - tests timeout

verification.evidence: framer-motion.ts mock exists; 73 animation tests run in 29ms (under 100ms requirement)

features.description: Create src/test/mocks/resize-observer.ts for components using ResizeObserver
Create src/test/utils/render.tsx with custom render function including providers
features.rationale: Standardize test rendering with all required context providers

verification.criteria: Custom render wraps with BrandProvider and theme
verification.evidence: render.tsx exists with custom render wrapping BrandProvider and theme support

features.description: Create src/components/ui/__tests__/button.test.tsx with variant, size, disabled, and loading tests
features.rationale: Example test pattern for UI components

features.description: Create src/lib/react-agent/__tests__/coordinator.test.ts testing dispatch, batch, and aggregation
features.rationale: Coordinator is core - needs comprehensive tests

verification.criteria: Coordinator tests cover all distribution strategies

features.description: Create src/lib/react-agent/brand/__tests__/config.test.ts for resolveConfig and validateConfig
features.rationale: Brand config is critical path - needs test coverage

verification.criteria: Config resolution tests pass for all scenarios

features.description: Add vitest.config.ts with browser mode configuration for accurate DOM testing
Install @axe-core/react and create src/test/utils/a11y.ts for accessibility testing

verification.criteria: A11y tests integrated in component test suite

features.description: Create playwright.config.ts for visual regression testing

features.description: Create src/test/visual/__tests__/components.spec.ts for component screenshot tests

features.description: Create stories for Button, Card, Input, and Dialog components

verification.criteria: All stories render correctly in Storybook

features.description: Create src/test/fixtures/brand-kits.ts with mock brand kit data for testing

features.description: Install @opentelemetry/api, @opentelemetry/sdk-trace-base, @opentelemetry/sdk-metrics
features.rationale: OpenTelemetry is the standard for AI agent observability

features.description: Create src/lib/telemetry/tracer.ts with OpenTelemetry tracer initialization

verification.criteria: Agent spans include all required attributes

features.description: Add tracing instrumentation to Coordinator.dispatch() and executeTask()

features.description: Create src/lib/telemetry/metrics.ts for agent performance metrics
features.rationale: Track task duration, success rate, queue depth

features.description: Create src/lib/react-agent/health/health-check.ts with agent heartbeat monitoring

features.description: Add circuit breaker pattern to Coordinator for failing agents
features.rationale: Prevent cascading failures when agents fail repeatedly

verification.criteria: Circuit opens after N failures, half-opens after timeout

features.description: Create src/lib/telemetry/logger.ts with structured logging (pino or winston)

verification.criteria: Logs include trace context for correlation

features.description: Create src/lib/react-agent/security/css-validator.test.ts with comprehensive CSS injection tests

verification.criteria: All known CSS injection vectors blocked

features.description: Add eslint-plugin-security and eslint-plugin-xss to ESLint config

features.description: Create src/lib/react-agent/security/input-sanitizer.ts for user input validation
Add Content Security Policy (CSP) documentation for generated components

features.description: Add rate limiting to Coordinator with configurable limits per agent
Create SECURITY.md with vulnerability reporting process

features.description: Create tests for loadBrandKit() verifying NPM and local path loading
